summary: Completed comprehensive testing of SAML SSO integration fixes for Kissflow IAM. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). All critical SAML SSO features verified working: public URL usage, SAML response signing with signxml, correct ACS URL, proper NameID, and no internal cluster URLs.
passed_tests: Health endpoint (/api/health)
Acme admin login (admin@acme.com / Admin123!)
Refex admin login (gowtham.s@refex.co.in / Admin123!)
SAML SSO endpoint returns HTML (/api/saml/{app_id}/sso)
SAML SSO HTML contains public URL (kissflow-access-hub.preview.emergentagent.com)
SAML SSO HTML does NOT contain internal cluster URLs
SAML SSO preserves RelayState parameter
SAML Complete requires authentication
SAML Complete returns HTML form with SAMLResponse
SAML Complete form posts to correct ACS URL (refexgroup.kissflow.com)
SAML Response is SIGNED (contains SignatureValue, DigestValue, X509Certificate)
SAML Response Issuer uses public URL
SAML Response NameID contains user email (gowtham.s@refex.co.in)
Kissflow config returns public URLs (/api/apps/saml/{app_id}/kissflow-config)
Kissflow config has security key (certificate fingerprint)
SAML Metadata returns XML (/api/apps/saml/{app_id}/metadata)
SAML Metadata contains public domain URLs
App Launcher shows Kissflow app for authorized user
Invalid app ID returns 404 for all SAML endpoints
Login with SSO param redirects to SAML complete after login
context_for_next_testing_agent: SAML SSO integration is fully working. Key fixes verified: 1) PUBLIC_URL env var used for URL construction, 2) signxml library used for SAML response signing (replaced broken xmlsec), 3) All endpoints use get_public_base_url() for public URLs. The Kissflow SAML app (e5a4c999-65fd-4301-9ebd-8948893eea0d) belongs to Refex Industries org and is accessible by gowtham.s@refex.co.in user.

verified_fixes.public_url_usage: All SAML endpoints now use PUBLIC_URL env var (https://kissflow-access-hub.preview.emergentagent.com) instead of internal cluster URLs
verified_fixes.saml_signing: SAML responses are now properly signed using signxml library with RSA-SHA256 algorithm
verified_fixes.issuer_url: SAML Issuer is correctly set to https://kissflow-access-hub.preview.emergentagent.com/api/saml/{app_id}
verified_fixes.acs_url: Form correctly posts to Kissflow ACS URL (https://refexgroup.kissflow.com/signin/2/AcCMptlq60zH/saml/?acs)
